programme.desc: After giving up her daughter as a young woman, a teacher might soon discover her daughter in the classroom.

programme.desc: After a 40-year manhunt, investigators finally find their needle in a DNA haystack and unmask a man who they suspect as California’s most prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hiding in Plain Sight Part 2
programme.desc: The Golden State Killer has been identified by law enforcement as Joseph James DeAngelo. Now accused of committing some of California’s most heinous crimes, this man was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ink Beads
programme.desc: Father and teacher are found hanging naked from a tree with the words 'F E D' on his chest. With barely any evidence to work with, investigators turn to these letters for answers, leading to a surprising conclusion that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Obsession
programme.desc: The murder of teacher’s aide leaves a hole in the heart of her small community. As rumors spread about suspects, the actual perp slipped further away. Investigators and a scientific breakthrough lead to a shocking end of the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Portrait of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ink Beads

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Shark Trek

programme.title: Return to Lair of the Great White

programme.title: Serengeti: d+ First Look: Serengeti II

programme.title: Monster Sharks of Andros Island

programme.title: Ninja Sharks 2: Mutants Rising

programme.title: Mega Jaws of Bird Island

programme.title: Mystery of the Black Demon Shark

programme.title: Mechashark

programme.title: Air Jaws: Going for Gold

programme.title: Serengeti: d+ First Look: Serengeti II

programme.desc: A cosplayer meets with the doctors to make her body more comical. Later, Dr. Dubrow helps a woman whose previous plastic surgery left her with a heart on her butt, while Dr. Nassif operates on a woman who had her nose ruined over 30 years ago.

programme.title: Botched: All Twerk and No Play
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a woman with boobs gone bad get her sexy back and a bodybuilder get back in the gym. Later, the doctors offer advice to a patient on her cheeky trans-formation.

programme.title: Botched: To Implant or Not to Implant ... That Is the Question
programme.desc: Rodrigo Alves returns after undergoing three nasal surgeries in less than a year. Later, Terry helps a Texas chef with jarring pain from her breast implants, and a dominatrix undergoes an unconventional procedure for butt projection.

programme.title: Botched: Twin Terrors
programme.desc: The doctors meet a set of twins with not-so-identical problems. Later, Dr. Dubrow tries to help the world's first paraplegic fitness model achieve her dream, while Dr. Nassif performs a rhinoplasty on a woman with a cleft palate deformity.

programme.title: Botched: 4000cc's and Counting
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif takes on a man with three eyebrows and later, a woman wants to downsize money makers.

programme.title: Botched: Lumpy Lady Lumps
programme.desc: A fitness fanatic wants to fix her lady lumps. Later, Dr. Nassif helps a house flipper close the deal on her witchy nose.

programme.title: Botched: Sticky Nipples and Paparazzi Nightmares
programme.desc: A mother of two has to duct tape up her breasts, and later, a young nurse has nose raved by nasal file. A D-list celebrity would like to get an A-list nose.

programme.title: Movie: Runaway Bride
programme.desc: A newspaper columnist investigates a small-town bride-to-be who has a unique history.

programme.title: Movie: What Happens in Vegas

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Planner
programme.desc: A workaholic wedding planner falls for the engaged doctor whose wedding she is organizing.

programme.title: Movie: Selena

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Mini-Golf Cake
programme.desc: It may be called miniature golf, but there's nothing small about Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman's cakes, created as playable holes for a putt-putt event hosted by LPGA tour professional golfer Michelle Wie.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Knott's Berry Cake
programme.desc: Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman create cakes that look and move like theme park rides for Knott's Berry Farm's 100th anniversary. TV host Lisa Joyner unveils their creations at an action-packed event.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Star Wars Cake
programme.desc: For their final challenge, Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman create their biggest, most elaborate cakes yet to celebrate Star Wars Day.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faces, New Places
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's visiting some familiar Triple D faces and checking out their new places including a primo pizza joint in Flagstaff, Arizona firing up pies with not-your-everyday toppings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: On the Hook and in the Bun
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in off-the-hook seafood and digging into some serious sandwiches on this trip. In Seattle, a beer-lover's spot serving fantastic fish and chips and the bomb beef dip. On the big island of Hawaii, a local gem dishin' out fresh-catches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pasta, Potatoes and Pescatarian
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri tastes everything from pasta to potatoes, and he's got some grub for his pescatarian friends. First up, Vanilla Ice takes Guy to his favorite Ecuadorian joint in West Palm Beach, Fla., for standout ceviche.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bagels, Biscuit and Boar
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into all kinds of flavour, starting in Santa Fe, N.M., at a pub serving comfort grub like chicken and biscuits and in-the-shell clam chowder. Also, a spot in Reno, NV, is on its game with a double elk chop and wild boar spaetzle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Meat and Sweet Treats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into mega meat and a little bit of sweet. In Atlanta, a Korean-taqueria mashing up unique flavors in their chicken tacos and bulgogi fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sweet, Savory and Saucy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taste buds are in for a culinary adventure. In Bakersfield, Calif., the classic cafe dishing out meaty Texas chili and decadent pumpkin pancakes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D All Stars
programme.desc: In Georgetown, Texas, Guy hooks up with Matthew McConaughey at a massive diner serving up righteous ham and waffles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Standouts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes to Chicago to visit an authentic Cuban joint serving fricassee de pollo. He goes to Memphis to a neighbourhood gastro pub serving dishes like duck fried rice and homemade popcorn. In Annapolis, he savours chipolte habanero barbecue pork.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Summer Celebration
programme.desc: It's all about summer celebrations in Ree Drummond's ranch kitchen. She starts by making customizable roasted brisket sliders and a big grilled veggie salad, followed by a lemon and berry icebox cake and fizzy sparkling sangria.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of Real Deals

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Mexican Brunch

programme.title: The Zoo: Love Shack

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx-Sized: Welcoming Baby Blue Chick

programme.title: The Zoo: Tiger's Day at the Dentist
programme.desc: The staff is hopeful for a successful breeding season when Mshango the giraffe meets the females of the herd. Power tools are needed for an Amur tiger's root canal, while Louie the swan falls ill, jeopardizing his release.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Rare Egg
programme.desc: It's a series of firsts when the Central Park Zoo welcomes its first-ever Atlantic puffin chick. A rhino called Penny undergoes a series of allergy tests, while an endangered species of gecko welcomes her first hatchling.

programme.desc: The future of the American bison depends on a high-stakes race across the country. The reptile staff have their hands full with a diamond rattlesnake that needs to be medicated orally. A pair of cheetahs is trained to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Way Out
programme.desc: When an out of state hunter appears to be lying about the circumstances surrounding his deer kill, Officers Bob Mancini and Kevin Bronson investigate. Conservation Officers work with volunteers to recover the body of a missing hiker on Mt. Washington.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: Officer Kevin Bronson races to get a driver under the influence off the road. Officer Eric Hannett catches two teenagers joyriding an ATV on a public road. Up north, Officer Bob Mancini helps evacuate an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Truth or Consequences
programme.desc: In New Hampshire, Officer Glen Lucas investigates a dispute between a turkey hunter and an eyewitness. Sergeant Todd Szewczyk hunts down a trespassing target shooter and Officers McKee and Matson fish for the truth from trespassing ATV riders.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Officer Eric Hannett and Officer Bill Boudreau chase down a likely deer poacher. Officer Glen Lucas makes a dangerous trek to the summit of Mt. Washington to rescue a stranded and injured hiker.

programme.title: Serengeti: d+ First Look: Serengeti II
programme.desc: Join us for a sneak peak of season 2 of the innovative series 'Serengeti.'

programme.title: North Woods Law: Under the Radar

programme.title: North Woods Law: Spring Training
programme.desc: Officer Lucas sends a trainee to wrangle his first angry raccoon. Officer Fluette untangles a trapper's web of lies. Officer Benvenuti tries to rescue an injured gosling. Officers Boudreau and Hannett question father and son turkey hunters.

programme.title: North Woods Law: A Test of Strength
programme.desc: Officer Demler helps a hiker with a severe shoulder injury. Officer Fluette and K-9 Moxie take their certification test. Officer Holmes and trainee Frye look for evidence of an illegal deer kill. Officer MacFadzen bonds with his son on a hunting trip.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Decoy Detail
programme.desc: Officer Egan sets up a decoy and checks hunters at a popular bird hunting site. Officers Towne and Bronson help rescue an injured hiker on Mount Kearsarge. Plus, Lt. Boudreau and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunting on private property call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Out of Options
programme.desc: Officer Cyrs gets a call about a rabid fox that attacked a homeowner. Officer Crouse tracks down a group of ATV riders. Lt. Murphy talks to a farmer about a nuisance bear. Officers Frye and Jones investigate a hunter that may have shot from the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Raccoon Rescue
programme.desc: With the help of local police, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett remove campers found illegally occupying state property. An 8-year-old boy is found riding solo on an ATV, and Officer Crouse helps two raccoon cubs found on the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Running Out of Time

programme.title: Good Bones: Free House, Expensive Reno
programme.desc: Mina and Karen venture into a new neighborhood, Irvington, where Mina acquired a home from a real estate friend. When a serious problem arises with the small cottage, the entire plan for the property changes and making a profit becomes an enormous hurdle.

programme.title: Good Bones: Chop and Pop
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are back in the Bates-Hendricks neighborhood and hoping to turn a profit this time around.

programme.title: Good Bones: A Charred Charmer for Cory
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are tackling a 100-year-old home that's endured a severe fire and foundational damage. Cory loves its potential and is interested in making this his permanent home, but the costly list of extreme challenges may cause him to get burned.

programme.title: Home Town: Countryside in the City
programme.desc: A couple is ready for a different pace after living in the country for years. They're hoping to find a historic home that lets them hold onto the countryside with a spacious garden. Ben and Erin show them two very different options.

programme.title: Home Town: Military Family Finds Small Town Charm in Mississippi
programme.desc: A well-traveled serviceman and his wife settle down after finding a job in small town Mississippi. Ben and Erin have been given an all-in budget and are tasked with satisfying the couple's wish list that includes a historic home with a chef's kitchen.

programme.title: Home Town: Leaving the Nest
programme.desc: Newlyweds are ready to move out of a parents' garage apartment and into their first home together. With an all-in budget, these two local artists hope to find a house with a master suite, large open kitchen and plenty of room for entertaining.

programme.title: Home Town: The Littlest House
programme.desc: A business owner that's been living with her mom is ready to find a place she can call her own. With an all-in budget of $100,000, she's looking for a small home with a porch. Ben and Erin transform the house using breathtaking Americana charm.

programme.title: Movie: Pool Boy Nightmare
programme.desc: A woman has a brief affair with pool cleaner, but quickly turns down his continued advances. Insulted at being rejected, he starts dating her high school age daughter, using her as an unsuspecting pawn in a twisted game of revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Sleeping With Danger
programme.desc: A flight attendant meets a man on a flight who sweeps her off her feet. But her dream man quickly becomes a nightmare and his jealousy leads to a brutal attack, which forces her to escape and go into hiding.

programme.title: Movie: A Murder to Remember

programme.title: Movie: A Bad Moms Christmas
programme.desc: Sick of the Christmas chaos, three moms decide to celebrate the holiday in a much more low-key and less stressful fashion this year, but their plans are disrupted when their respective mothers all unexpectedly decide to spend the holiday with them.

programme.title: Movie: Pretty Woman
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman hires a free-spirited call girl to be his companion for a week. Slowly they draw things from each other and from within themselves that make them hope against their own sceptical nature for a fairy tale ending.

programme.title: Movie: A Bad Moms Christmas
programme.desc: Sick of the Christmas chaos, three moms decide to celebrate the holiday in a much more low-key and less stressful fashion this year, but their plans are disrupted when their respective mothers all unexpectedly decide to spend the holiday with them.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey: Jingle Bells and Prison Cells
programme.desc: Melissa breaks ground on her boutique 'Envy' despite Joe's desire to keep her at home. Jacqueline catches up with friends on facelifts and finances. Finally, after nearly a year in prison, Teresa returns home to her family in time for Christmas.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey: A Very Hairy Christmas
programme.desc: Melissa hosts the Gorga/ Giudice Christmas Eve dinner and reunites with Teresa for the first time in a year. Later, Jacqueline gets a call from Teresa as Dolores attempts to negotiate peace between the two ex-BFFs. Joe and Gia are at odds over NYE plans.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Rocky Boat Horror Story
programme.desc: Kenya makes a surprise visit to Chateau Sheree and is astonished by what she uncovers. After Cynthia and Peter's emotional talk surrounding their relationship, Cynthia talks with Kandi about the uncertainty of her marriage.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Where is the Love Boat?
programme.desc: Cynthia and Porsha's argument quickly takes a turn for the worse and drama ensues on what was supposed to be a fun, girl’s booze cruise. Back on land, the group is in discord as everyone's version of what happened causes conflict amongst the ladies.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Bienvenido a Miami
programme.desc: An unlikely pair, Kenya and Porsha join forces to plan a girls trip to Miami as a 're-do' for the disaster that came out of their last outing. Prosha takes the fun getaway to the next level by renting a yacht for all the ladies to enjoy.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Miami Spice
programme.desc: Trouble arrives in paradise when a guest of the house takes the drama to new heights, causing tensions to rise. Porsha takes time away from the ladies for a date with a new suitor. After the dust settles, two of the women decide to go back to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: There's No Business Like Friend Business
programme.desc: Porsha continues her long-distance romance with a beau she met in Miami in hopes that he may be 'the one.' Meanwhile, Kenya remains true to her plan to 'date like a man' and sets her eyes on a younger man.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Shade For Days
programme.desc: Kenya continues to build her dream home and discovers her family relationships are also in need of some construction as well. Porsha heads to Los Angeles to cover an awards show, but her conflict with her sister Lauren might compromise her performance.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Trouble on the Family Tree
programme.desc: Kandi finally begins to slow down as Mama Joyce helps her prepare for her bundle of joy to arrive. Phaedra receives a surprise visit from Mama Joyce and is faced with an offer she can't refuse.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Ms. Parks Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Phaedra hosts a trip to the nation's capital to garner support for her Save Our Sons organization and invites a few of the ladies to tag along. During their visit to Congress, Kim once again finds herself on the outskirts of the festivities.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Beauties and the Beat
programme.desc: Kandi and Todd prepare for Baby Tucker’s arrival with a refresher course in parenting, while Phaedra and Ayden get crafty to celebrate Apollo's birthday while he’s away in prison.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Jamaican Beef Catty
programme.desc: The ladies take over Jamaica with their men in tow. Nene surprises the girls on the island and creates an immediate rift between Kenya and Cynthia's friendship. Meanwhile, back at home Kandi and Todd prepare for baby Tucker's arrival.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Peaches of the Caribbean
programme.desc: The BFF drama continues after Cynthia is confronted by Kenya regarding statements she made to the other ladies. Peter plays tour guide and takes the group to meet his family in Jamaica. Meanwhile, Kenya and Matt stay behind for a bit of romance.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Read School is in Session
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the rumors regarding Kim's husband's sexuality, Phaedra and Nene offer her some advice on how to stand up against the accusations. Meanwhile, back in Atlanta, Kandi and Todd struggle to convince Aunt Bertha to take part in their idea.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Turning Over a New Peach
programme.desc: After working on Cynthia's 'mercial,' Kim is determined to move her directing career forward while avoiding any more drama with Kenya. Kenya's Aunt Lori grills her about her boyfriend, leaving her conflicted about pursing a future with a younger man.

programme.desc: Danny turns a 1967 GTO into a world class muscle car and hopes for a monstrous flip. Later, Mike and Roli get in a sticky situation and Danny tries to buy a classic Mercury from an old friend.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tommy Lee's Chopper

programme.title: The Cars That Made America

programme.title: Movie: Ferdinand

programme.title: Big City Greens: Times Circle/ Super Gramma

programme.title: Big City Greens: Greens' Acres/ Dolled Up
programme.desc: Young Bill will do whatever it takes to keep the family farm in business. When Tilly and Nancy celebrate Saxon's birthday at a fancy doll store, they set their sights on a seat next to Cantaloupe Sinclair, the tea party's posh VIP.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm

programme.title: Jessie: Cattle Calls and Scary Walls

programme.title: Jessie: Green-Eyed Monsters

programme.title: What on Earth?: America's Secret Apocalypse

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Valhalla

programme.desc: Alien monoliths haunting the coast of England. An obliterated jungle pointing to a brutal narco gold rush. Evidence of a strange blood-red creature emerging from the deep.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: A Killing in Kendrick
programme.desc: Donna Fontaine and her boyfriend Fred Palahniuk are found shot dead in a burning building in remote Kendrick, Idaho. A conspiracy of silence protects the killer until his lovers crack and confess the damning evidence needed to convict him.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Jehovah Jinx
programme.desc: Jehovah's Witness Pam Candelario is murdered during a home invasion and her husband Ralph is brutally beaten. But what appears to be a home invasion soon turns into one of the most bizarre murder cases that police have ever encountered.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: In the Dead of Night
programme.desc: In Rison, Arkansas, a young woman is abducted from her home in the middle of the night. When investigators ultimately dig up her body in the woods, they uncover a horrible murder plot that led to the victim's gruesome demise.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Lost Highway
programme.desc: In 1996, in Tulsa, Oklahoma, a young mother is found dead on the side of a rural stretch of highway in an apparent hit-and-run accident. But as the family grieves, the façade begins to crack, and soon the truth seeps out.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Path
programme.desc: In 1997, in quaint Anne Arundel County, Maryland, a detective inherits a stack of cold cases. As he begins to unravel each one, he uncovers a shocking and gruesome common thread.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: We Found Bonnie
programme.desc: In 1993, a family is torn apart when a mother in Jacksonville, Florida goes missing. The case stumps detectives, who believe that the truth about what happened to her is locked inside the mind of the missing woman's three-year-old son.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Ride Along
programme.desc: One night in 1993, in Manhattan Beach, California, an officer is shot and killed during a routine traffic stop. The only witness is a young boy who is too terrified to tell police what he saw.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Path
programme.desc: In 1997, in quaint Anne Arundel County, Maryland, a detective inherits a stack of cold cases. As he begins to unravel each one, he uncovers a shocking and gruesome common thread.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: We Found Bonnie
programme.desc: In 1993, a family is torn apart when a mother in Jacksonville, Florida goes missing. The case stumps detectives, who believe that the truth about what happened to her is locked inside the mind of the missing woman's three-year-old son.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Ride Along
programme.desc: One night in 1993, in Manhattan Beach, California, an officer is shot and killed during a routine traffic stop. The only witness is a young boy who is too terrified to tell police what he saw.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Lost Highway
programme.desc: In 1996, in Tulsa, Oklahoma, a young mother is found dead on the side of a rural stretch of highway in an apparent hit-and-run accident. But as the family grieves, the façade begins to crack, and soon the truth seeps out.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Mississippi Mayhem
programme.desc: Greg May, 56, is getting ready to move to Florida with a new girlfriend when he vanishes without a trace. Police aren't sure if the tattoo artist turned Civil War collector is alive or dead until their investigation uncovers a horrific plot.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: The Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: Karen Pannell has wonderful friends, family and a loving boyfriend. Yet when she is found murdered, the brutality indicates the killer was close to her. As Police try to uncover who could have wanted her dead, they find a clue written by Karen herself.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Nightmares on Main Street
programme.desc: Detectives uncover a day care abuse scandal in Austin, Texas, that horrifies a community, while women across the nation come forward with chilling tales of ritual abuse.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: The Disappearance of Sarah Stern
programme.desc: When a young woman's car is found abandoned on a bridge, police must consider three possibilities, she's run away, committed suicide, or is the victim of murder.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Evidence Never Lies
programme.desc: A young woman is found drowned in her bathtub and the evidence at the crime scene indicates her killer was someone she knew and trusted.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son Should Die in Prison
programme.desc: Jon Eason hopes every day that someone will murder his son Dylan in prison. Dylan Eason's life sentence without parole doesn't appease his father, who admits wishing for his own son's death is horrible but feels Dylan deserves it for his 2016 crimes.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Mother-To-Be
programme.desc: In Burlington, North Carolina, 2003, pregnant April Greer vanishes. Her boyfriend says she left him, and her family is worried sick. No one knows that the unbearable truth about what really happened to April is the stuff of nightmares.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: Bill and Mary Yoder are a happy couple, running a medical practice outside of Utica, New York. But their world collapses when Mary becomes mysteriously sick, and detectives prove that her illness was no accident.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Unfriendly Community
programme.desc: One June morning cleaning lady Myra heads into the property office and is confronted by a nightmare scene. The office has been ransacked and there is blood everywhere- property manager Melinda Schaefer is dead. Police work hard to get justice.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: Death's Final Cut
programme.desc: In the desert region of Southern California, a once grand manor is bought by B-movie horror director Al Adamson, who plans to renovate and sell it. What no one imagines is that in June 1995, the home will become a real-life horror movie.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Bound By Blood
programme.desc: The busy streets of Atlanta, GA are shaken as horror of the 'Necktie Killer' strikes the city with fear. Detectives from neighboring counties piece together correlative clues and distinctive apparel left behind at each crime scene.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Bloodlines
programme.desc: An elderly couple are found murdered in their home. At first it's believed to be a robbery-gone-wrong until detectives realize it may me a family member with a grudge.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Watcher
programme.desc: On a rare day off from work, single mom Carrie Caudill and a friend embark on a well-deserved girl's night out. But out of nowhere, an unexpected confrontation puts Carrie on a dangerous collision course with a calculating and sadistic madman.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: Waco Standoff: As We Watched
programme.desc: On April 19, 1993, FBI agents attacked a religious compound in Waco, Texas, occupied by a small obscure religious cult. 76 people, including 26 children, died. The repercussions of Waco are still being felt.

programme.title: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the U.S. has not shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: Tank Battles of Korea
programme.desc: In 1950 the world is caught off guard as North Korea launches a massive armoured assault into South Korea. This is the story of the American tankers who rush to the aid of the South and the bloody battles they fight up and down the Korean Peninsula.

programme.title: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Edge of War: MacArthur's Great Gamble
programme.desc: Failing to stop Kim Il Sung's forces on land, MacArthur devises an amphibious assault at Inchon with the intelligence aid of naval officer Lt. Eugene Clark.

programme.title: Inside Special Ops: The Unit
programme.desc: Explore America's most secretive and deadly unit, Delta Force. Get an inside look at their deadly missions to take down some of the world's greatest threats.

programme.title: Secrets of Diplomatic Security
programme.desc: They are the front lines of United States Diplomacy: Special Agents of the State Department's highly secretive protective force called Diplomatic Security. Go deep inside this clandestine force and learn secrets never before revealed to the public.

programme.title: Inside Special Ops: Forecon
programme.desc: Inside Special Ops explores the Force Reconnaissance companies, providing an inside look at their extreme training programs and deadly stealth missions around the world.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Hitler's Obsession
programme.desc: Hitler's desire to acquire the largest art collection in the world led to the theft of numerous rare art treasures throughout Europe. The team delves into how these mass thefts were orchestrated. Also, an astounding discovery is made.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: In Hot Water
programme.desc: After ten years of saving and dreaming for a pool, a couple wants Lucas to build the wow factor. The crew creates a giant double-pool feature with a connecting stream and several customized surprises to deliver the 'wow' and dismiss any doubt.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Fiesta de Laguna
programme.desc: It's fiesta time as pool designer Lucas Congdon and his crew are challenged to create a Mexican resort in a Venice, Florida residential backyard. Lucas encounters several design 'firsts' on his journey to infuse the flavors of Mexico into his creation.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Small Yard, Big Dreams
programme.desc: A dedicated caregiver gets her lifelong wish of having her own pool. Lucas faces the pressure of not only building a dream pool, but has to create it in a small backyard. The team transforms the family's yard into a little oasis with big potential.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wowing In Wildwood
programme.desc: A couple that's relocating from the Washington, DC, area to Wildwood, New Jersey, finds the perfect beach house for their family of five. It needs serious renovating, and while they have a big budget, they also have a big wish list.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: On the Hunt for a St. Pete Beach Retreat in Florida
programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Outer Banks Transformation
programme.desc: After 20 years of renting on North Carolina's Outer Banks, two high school sweethearts are determined to purchase their forever home. They find a fixer-upper that's perfect for their family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Poolside Paradise in Cocoa Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Candice and Brian are moving from Denver, Colo. to Cocoa Beach, Fla., and have enlisted broker Andy Barclay to help them find a home on the water with a pool and a large outdoor space for their two daughters.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Back to the Beach on the Jersey Shore
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach house in Ventnor City, New Jersey, where they can make memories with their daughter on the Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fungal Gourmet: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2000 with new recipes for mushroom stroganoff and pickled mushrooms. Oh, and there's a visit from a certain insect who just so happens to be made of some of the same materials as mushrooms.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Art Of Darkness II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic cocoa powder show with three updated dishes including a new twist on brownies, an introduction to black cardamom and a scientific road race.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Garces vs. Paley
programme.desc: Challenging Chef Vitaly Paley gave up the piano to challenge Iron Chef Garces.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto Vs. Hines
programme.desc: Chef Makoto Okuwa, a former sous chef to Iron Chef Morimoto enters Kitchen Stadium for the first time as a challenger to Iron Chef Michael Symon. Will Okuwa break under the pressure of leading his own team?

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Guarnaschelli vs. Kalt
programme.desc: Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli faces off against challenger Stephen Kalt. Chef Kalt's Southern Italian cuisine can be sampled at Fornelleto, in the Borgata Hotel in Atlantic City and his most recent venture is Caulfield's in Beverly Hills, Calif.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Forgione vs. Waxman
programme.desc: Iron Chef Marc Forgione plays the role of sous chef to his father, Larry Forgione, as the two take on culinary legend and close family friend chef Jonathan Waxman.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon vs. Johnson
programme.desc: Former accountant Chef Wayne Johnson challenges Iron Chef Michael Symon.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Allegretti
programme.desc: Iron Chef Bobby Flay faces off against Challenger Alain Allegretti, Executive Chef at La Promenade des Anglais in New York City.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: It's a Dog's Life
programme.desc: Buddy and Duff put their skills to the test making pies that are delicious and beautiful enough to wow the judges. Buddy pays homage to his Old World roots, while Duff follows his artistic impulses. They create dog-themed cakes for Christina Anstead.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Wedding Wars
programme.desc: Duff Goldman brings Buddy Valastro into his world of fine dining with a challenge to create elegant plated desserts. In the cake-off, they must create a cake for celebrity event planner Slomique Hawrylo's bridal fitting event.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Donuts and Magic
programme.desc: Kicking things off in the bake-off challenge, pastry chefs Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman have to handle the morning rush at Los Angeles' iconic Randy's Donuts drive-thru. They prepare dozens of deep-fried delights.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: The Grand Finale
programme.desc: For the finale, pastry chefs Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman head to the Food Network Kitchen to create their most heartfelt and monumental creations yet: chocolate desserts to conceal engagement rings for two surprise proposals.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Far From The Farm
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Des Moines the way Iowans do, with crisp and cheesy breakfast nachos. Then it's onto a roasted chicken lunch with comforting mashed potatoes and onion rings, before snacking on a truly divine Napoleon.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Austin
programme.desc: Ali reveal the best meals that Austin has to offer in a sweet and savory stop that includes: migas tacos at a popular roadside stop, authentic Texas barbecue, a buttery journey in baking and a Bayou experience straight from MawMaw's recipe book.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: C-Ville Eats
programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Charlottesville, Va. for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. College town food has never tasted so good.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: A Buzz in Brooklyn

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Greenville Goodness

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Sweet Deals Down South
programme.desc: Ali Khan has only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Savannah, Ga., for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and a snack!

programme.title: Fire Masters: Grilled to Have You Here
programme.desc: The chefs are thrilled to enter the Fire Masters Arena and show the judges what they can do. The competitors make sure the judges eat their fruits and veggies in the Crossfire Round, and the Feast of Fire is a flame-kissed fiesta of flavour.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Miami
programme.desc: We are headed to Miami for a little fun in the sun and some truly epic eats. We're trying it all, from stone crabs at Joe's, to the lamb shank at Sardinia. The piping hot oven at Fratelli La Bufala is turning out pillowy calzones.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Layers Of Goodness
programme.desc: Get ready to pile it on thick as we're talking layers of goodness that are stacked to the ceiling. We take a trip to Chicago where we meet up with Jeff Mauro to discover all the magic colors hidden inside the rainbow cake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Key Ingredient
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the surprise ingredient that goes into the best cinnamon roll ever, Alex Guarnaschelli loves sourdough bread made with pickle juice, and Monti Carlo heads to New Orleans for the most unique, irresistible oysters ever.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried and Gone to Heaven
programme.desc: Some fried food is so crispy, so crunchy and so incredible that you feel like you've died and gone to heaven. Jeff Mauro heads to Proxi in Chicago for a food frenzy with the most-unique version of street corn ever imagined. Simon Majumdar takes his taste.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: New Mexico
programme.desc: The frontier spirit can still be found in New Mexico even when it comes to the food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern finds that you can still get a taste of the Wild West in the food of Denver, offering a goldmine of flavours from the past and present.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago Neighborhoods
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the neighborhoods that make Chicago a culinary treasure trove. From handcrafted burgers in the West Loop to street-style tacos in Wicker Park and barbecue chicken served up in Bronzeville.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew explores the frontier fare of Denver, Colorado. From classic game meats remade for the modern palette to the signature green chilli sauce of Den-Mex cuisine, Denver has become the region's cultural hub with an abundance of top-shelf food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Brooklyn
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern digs into Brooklyn, New York's, iconic eats. The multicultural borough offers old-school relics like insanely juicy steak, perfect New York pizza, Jewish pastries swirled with chocolate, decadent cheesecake and Russia's take on ravioli.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Atlanta, Ga
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary crusade brings him to Atlanta for a decadent doughnut brunch, beastly barbecue and a five-pound mountain of tater tot nachos.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Beagle Birthday Breakout!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: Perfect Match / All Fired Up
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: Poetry Scam / Crushed Out
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: Girl's Day Out / The Woof Factor
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: The Nose Job Part 1 / The Nose Job Part 2
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: My Fair Dolly / Flea-Maggedon
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: A Right Royal Rumble / Dal-Martians
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: Illusory Dragon! Mirage Fafnir!
programme.desc: Still recovering from their loss to Free De La Hoya, Hikaru and Hyuga decide to follow the Blading Legend’s own training regimen to learn the secrets behind his success.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: Dream Team! Tag Battle!
programme.desc: With their training trip to Spain coming to an end, Hyuga and Hikaru are desperate to leave a lasting impression with one final face-off against Free in an extreme Tag Battle.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Welcome to Walk the Prank
programme.desc: Follow four kids' antics at school and at home, which provide a source of inspiration for their pranks.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Fish You Were Here
programme.desc: Bailey is upset when she is the only one of her classmates not invited to a birthday party.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Crushed
programme.desc: Chance flirts with a girl via text message, but after she flakes on him, he starts to believe that Bailey is pranking him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Moving Situation
programme.desc: Chance and Herman learn that their father is up for a big promotion, and they might have to move to a different city if he gets the job.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: School Clubbing
programme.desc: The gang signs up for after school clubs. Bailey joins the 'friends of animals club,' Dusty the 'TV club,' Herman the 'wrestling club' and Chance the 'journalism club.'

programme.title: Walk the Prank: LOL the Vote
programme.desc: Chance is hoping to be voted 'class clown' for a record breaking fourth year in a row, but finds out Bailey is also vying for the title. Dusty is vying for 'most academic.'

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Spoiler Alert
programme.desc: Chance's parents take away his TV privileges, so Chance goes to great lengths to keep the season finale of his favorite show unspoiled.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Whatever Gets You Through the Night
programme.desc: Herman has been invited to his first ever sleepover, but he is terrified because sometimes he does crazy things in his sleep.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Grandma's Here to Stay
programme.desc: Dusty is stressed when his Grandma moves into his house and is now sharing a room with him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Wigging Out
programme.desc: When Bailey's hairstylist is sick, a new stylist has to cut her hair. Meanwhile, Chance is trying to find a way to make Herman fly.

programme.title: SportsCenter Featured: The Return
programme.desc: Rocky Bleier, was drafted and sent to Vietnam during his rookie with the Steelers. He was wounded in combat and told he would never play football again, but worked his way back earning four Super Bowl rings for the Steelers.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Declan's Legacy

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part One: 1869-1932
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Civil War, America's south is looking to put the past behind it, and finds one path in a growing cultural passion of the north: football. In December 1932, the Southeastern Conference is officially formed.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Two: 1933-1959
programme.desc: Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the 1950s. In 1958, LSU won with star running back Billy Cannon leading the way, and a year later Cannon had epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Three: 1960-1970
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the civil rights movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region. Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama, and of SEC football.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Four: 1969-1979
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns a cold case around.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Inside Pocket
programme.desc: An insurance agent is shot execution style in his office in broad daylight but the killer leaves no fingerprints and there is no murder weapon found at the scene. Then, investigators discover a critical clue invisible to the naked eye.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Obsession
programme.desc: The murder of teacher’s aide leaves a hole in the heart of her small community. As rumors spread about suspects, the actual perp slipped further away. Investigators and a scientific breakthrough lead to a shocking end of the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ink Beads
programme.desc: Father and teacher are found hanging naked from a tree with the words 'F E D' on his chest. With barely any evidence to work with, investigators turn to these letters for answers, leading to a surprising conclusion that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Rise
programme.desc: A single mom vanishes without a trace. Foul play is confirmed when a truck toolbox opens to her body inside. Homicide detectives investigate men she matched on dating sites, men from work, and a lover with a violent past.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Ten of Hearts
programme.desc: A 20-year-old woman sets out on her bike and never returns. Her body found a few miles from her house with a gunshot wound to the head. Years go by without any evidence or leads, until new investigators and technology breaks the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads

programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in Mexico seems to be burglary related. However, closer examination by law officials both sides of the border reveal a far more sinister truth.

programme.title: The Spawn of El Diablo
programme.desc: In 2012, Michelle Jewell documented one of the largest great white mating scars ever recorded. Recently similar marks have appeared, leading her to believe this is a possible mating ground and that mega-shark El Diablo has returned to South Africa.

programme.title: Mothersharker
programme.desc: It's a great mystery where tiger sharks give birth. One team of scientists deploys an arsenal of new technology to find out, but they need to meet some of Bahamas' biggest tiger shark mothers face-to-face for it to work.

programme.title: Jaws Awakens: Phred vs. Slash
programme.desc: Rumor has it that two of the largest sharks in existence have been recently roaming New Zealand waters, but nobody knows which one is the largest. Brandon McMillan and Dickie Chivell are heading out to see which one takes the cake: Phred or Slash.

programme.title: Crikey! It's Shark Week: Sharkmania
programme.desc: With Sharkmania facts and bonus scenes: Robert Irwin comes face to face with a great white for the first time ever. Following his father's footsteps, he gets as close as possible to determine which apex predator reigns supreme, crocs or great whites?

programme.title: Serengeti: Intrigue and Change
programme.desc: Great storms transform our new characters' welcoming new world into a wet, cold nightmare. As the landscape floods, everyone heads for higher ground hoping to avoid the dangers of being washed away in their unpredictable new reality.

programme.title: Shark Academy: Trial By Shark
programme.desc: Shark expert and scientist, Dr. Riley Elliott is ready to give someone a leap ahead in the competitive world of shark research. During an intense six-week crash course on sharks, eight rookies will be put to the test for a coveted spot on Riley's team.

programme.title: Tiffany Haddish Does Shark Week
programme.desc: Tiffany Haddish hosts Shark Week! While her fantasy was to uncover the secrets of shark sex sailing on the fanciest yachts, surrounded by friendly sea creatures and pampered by a handsome merman, she's in for the sharkiest of wake-up calls.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pet or Pests/ Komputer Overload
programme.desc: SpongeBob adopts a stray worm, which soon gives birth to a litter of baby worms.

programme.title: Hoarders: Sybil and Ron
programme.desc: Sybil's hoard is so intense that mice have started to live in her tub and her refrigerator. Ron has hoarded out his camera shop to the point where he has lost many of his customers.

programme.title: Hoarders: Leza and Linda
programme.desc: Leza's house is so packed, the city has red tagged it as uninhabitable and she is no longer allowed to live in it. If she doesn't clean up before the city imposed deadline, Leza could lose her property and end up homeless.

programme.title: Hoarders: Barbara G/ Fred and Mary

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Art
programme.desc: Adam poses the question of what makes great art and shows why pieces visible to the masses are revered, regardless of artistic merit. He exposes the masters as copycats, and reveals that today's art market is a moneymaking scheme.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins What We Learned in School
programme.desc: Adam shows that Columbus didn't discover America, King Tut was a dud, and the rules of grammar are not as ironclad as you'd think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins College
programme.desc: Adam shares why becoming a dropout billionaire is unlikely and how school rankings have little to do with education quality. Plus, student loans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr head to the Lone Star state in a special episode that proves even embarrassment is bigger in Texas. The city boys from New York whip up trouble teaching cowboy skills on a ranch, then sell Western wear.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: The guys give a taste of their awkward customer service at a liquor store, take tickets of humiliation at a deli counter and try to get signatures to recognize phony holidays. Tonight’s losers pay a frigid price in a cold-hearted double punishment.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Simon Soft
programme.desc: Michael turns iced tea into a tea candle and later, at a pet store, he reveals that caterpillars have wicks. Plus, at a warehouse, Michael stumps his assistant when he proves that big tricks come in shrink-wrapped packages.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Whippit

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Food Flattener

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1
programme.desc: Khloe invites her ex to True's first birthday party, but an uncomfortable confrontation in front of family and friends leaves her questioning her decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashians on Vacation
programme.desc: Travel around the world with Kim and the gang, as the defining moments from each of the Kardashian family vacations are recapped.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?
programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Married to Jonas: Escape to New York
programme.desc: Kevin shows Dani all that NYC has to offer in an attempt to move to the city. Meanwhile Mikey makes an announcement that shocks the family.

programme.title: Married to Jonas: Pom Pom's and Circumstance
programme.desc: Kevin, Nick and Joe Jonas head down to Louisiana to shoot their music video. Back home Dani juggles family issues and a fashion photo shoot.

programme.title: Married to Jonas: The New Dani
programme.desc: Dani gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to write a column for Cosmo Magazine. The Jonas Brothers make Mikey an incredible offer that he can't refuse.

programme.title: Married to Jonas: Fandemonium
programme.desc: While Kevin and the Jonas Brothers begin their whirlwind South American tour, Dani continues her work with Cosmo. An unexpected phone call threatens to derail Kevin's romantic plans.

programme.title: Married to Jonas: Los Jonas Hermanos
programme.desc: Dani’s new gig threatens to cut her trip to South America short, while Joe worries that Mikey’s nerves are going to get the best of him as prepares to play his biggest show ever.

programme.title: Married to Jonas: Lights, Camera, Cosmo
programme.desc: Dani's Cosmopolitan Magazine photo shoot is put into jeopardy when she is forced to deal with an emotional family meltdown. Mikey's move to LA tests his relationship with Bucky.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: We talk about dating with Carmen Electra, then reality stars Jax Taylor and Brittany Cartwright stop by.

programme.title: Movie: Selena
programme.desc: The life story of Mexican-American singer Selena, whose dreams were cut short at age 23.

programme.title: Modern Family: Grab It
programme.desc: Jay's favourite place in the world, may be losing some of its charm when Phil considers becoming a member. At the Dunphy house, Claire mistakes her influence on Alex's life choices, and Hayley cares too much about what Alex thinks about hers.

programme.title: Modern Family: Thanksgiving Jamboree
programme.desc: It's going to be a Thanksgiving jamboree at the Pritchett-Tucker home this year, and Cameron has spared no expense.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Alliance
programme.desc: Hayley's plan for a fun-filled girl's day with Rainer Shine's teen daughter may be a little more angst-filled than expected. Meanwhile, Luke finds himself in a compromising position with a widow at the club.

programme.title: Modern Family: Snow Ball
programme.desc: When Manny and Luke put on the school's lavish winter dance and end up over their heads due to a texting error, it is up to them to fix it before the end of the night.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All ABC Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's ABC games aren't as easy as 1, 2, 3! The chefs must prove their skills in three rounds as they make comfort classics and dinners with seafood and fried ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: New School vs. Old School
programme.desc: Guy Fieri wants to know which culinary form is best, so he has invited two old-school and two new-school chefs to test their skills against each other.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD Summer Games, Part 2: Extreme Tailgating
programme.desc: Guy Fieri starts Part 2 of the DDD Summer Games with three DDD chefs and a 'Flavortown 500' race with remote-control cars. The chef that crosses the finish line first gets first pick of proteins to use in two tailgating bites.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Preheat
programme.desc: Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman revisit some of their most-memorable challenges and favorite cakes over two seasons of battles. Buddy shares updates on his injured hand, Duff talks about being a new dad, and they tease the upcoming season.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Animal Kingdom
programme.desc: Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman kick off a new competition with cakes inspired by an African safari. Team Buddy creates fantastic beasts while Team Duff crafts a lion catching its prey.

programme.title: The Globe: From Hot Pots to Cassava
programme.desc: For their first challenge, the competing chefs are transported to Beijing to master the hot pot. Then they take on the cuisines of Tel Aviv, Israel, and Accra, Ghana, where the final two chefs must create a dish using plantains and cassava.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: You Look Radishing
programme.desc: It's a battle of the South vs. Southwest as chef Charlie Loomis of Chattanooga faces off against chef Israel Rivera from Albuquerque, N.M., for a shot at Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Greeking Out
programme.desc: The kitchen goes metal when Iron Chef Jose Garces and "Worst Cooks in America's" Anne Burrell team up to take down their good friend, Bobby Flay. They've handpicked "Tagine Queen" Aneesa Waheed and hard-hitting chef Ryan Lory to deliver the win.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Mexican Fiesta
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites her friends to a fun afternoon Mexican fiesta. She puts her spin on Mexican classics with recipes that include avocado salad, red and green charred salsa, cheater churros and steak fajitas.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Family Favorites with Allie Colleen
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood's daughter, Allie, joins her in the kitchen to learn some tips and tricks as they breathe new life into some favourite childhood dishes.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: All-American Clambake
programme.desc: Michael Symon is celebrating the holiday weekend with an All-American clambake with sweet potatoes and corn. Michael also makes his smoked chicken wings to push this festive meal over the top.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Perfect Plate of Summer
programme.desc: Summer foods are in the spotlight as The Kitchen creates a perfect plate of summer favourites. Sunny makes her London Broil with Tomato and Fennel, and Katie serves up Bacon and Ranch Potato Salad. The gang shares three new toppings for grilled corn.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Master Your Menu
programme.desc: These recipes can turn anyone into a weeknight warrior, starting with sloppy joes, a hot and crispy fish sandwich, and a Greek chicken skillet. Plus, a Mexican cola float to top off the week.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Picnic Palooza
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts serve up packable eats for the beach, park, pool or a hike. They make picnic fried chicken with honey giardiniera butter, curried chickpea salad pitas and chilled melon, cucumber and mint salad, and they share tips for outdoor feasting.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer Party Helpline
programme.desc: The Kitchen Helpline is answering summer party questions and sharing recipes like Geoffrey Zakarian's grilled seafood platter and Katie Lee's peach caprese with balsamic cherries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Shanghai
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China. From creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Loophole
programme.desc: When Gumball and Darwin give Bobert instructions on how to behave properly, Bobert applies his own logic to the rules.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Console
programme.desc: Elmore becomes trapped inside a fantasy RPG world when Gumball is given a cursed video game console. Gumball, Darwin and Anais have to battle their way through town, unraveling the secrets of their new virtual reality and leveling up to defeat the Boss.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Outside
programme.desc: The family goes to visit Richard's dad. Based on his basic living standards and extended absence from Richard's life, they assume Frankie must have done a stretch in the slammer. When he visits, they decide to turn their house into a prison.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Copycats
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin meet Kiki and Quack, a pair of siblings that copy everything they do and say. When they realize their whole family is making money online imitating the Wattersons, they realize they need a solution.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Catfish
programme.desc: Grandpa Louie has no friends on Elmore Plus, so Gumball and Darwin, feeling bad, create one called Muriel. Granny Jojo finds out that Louie has been spending time online with 'another woman' and sets out to destroy her, despite her not being real.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Cycle
programme.desc: Gumball, Darwin and Anais find out that Mr. Wilson has been bullying their dad most of his life. The kids try to help their dad and ultimately seek revenge against Mr. Wilson.
