programme.desc: The docs all must work together to solve a series of medical mysteries.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: A Pol New World
programme.desc: After five years at Pol Veterinary Services, the docs face Dr. Emily's departure.

programme.title: Heartland Docs, DVM: Old Town Rodeo
programme.desc: The Schroeders assist local ranchers and their prized animals ahead of the hometown rodeo.

programme.title: Heartland Docs, DVM: Doggie Delivery
programme.desc: Early spring in Nebraska brings new life and unpredictable veterinary challenges.

programme.title: Heartland Docs, DVM: Whole Llama Love
programme.desc: In Nebraska, clients bring creatures great and small to Drs. Ben and Erin Schroeder.

programme.title: Heartland Docs, DVM: Hold Your Horses
programme.desc: The doctors treat an array of complicated cases that are way more than meets the eye.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Warrior Queen's Treasure
programme.desc: Searching across England, Josh Gates unearths a cache of ancient treasure as he chases the legend of Queen Boudica, the legendary Celtic queen who nearly defeated the invading Roman army 2,000 years ago.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Chasing the Snake Kings
programme.desc: Josh Gates returns to Guatemala with a potential breakthrough in the search for a Snake King tomb.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Secret Solved
programme.desc: Breaking news forces Josh to race across the globe. One of the wickedly hard puzzles of The Secret, a case Josh has been chasing for years, might have been solved. He's been crisscrossing the US to track it down, but this solve is in Josh's hometown.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mahogany Ship
programme.desc: Josh searches for the missing Mahogany ship along Australia’s infamous Shipwreck Coast.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Chasing the Snake Kings
programme.desc: Josh Gates returns to Guatemala with a potential breakthrough in the search for a Snake King tomb.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Secret Solved
programme.desc: Breaking news forces Josh to race across the globe. One of the wickedly hard puzzles of The Secret, a case Josh has been chasing for years, might have been solved. He's been crisscrossing the US to track it down, but this solve is in Josh's hometown.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mahogany Ship
programme.desc: Josh searches for the missing Mahogany ship along Australia’s infamous Shipwreck Coast.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Warrior Queen's Treasure
programme.desc: Searching across England, Josh Gates unearths a cache of ancient treasure as he chases the legend of Queen Boudica, the legendary Celtic queen who nearly defeated the invading Roman army 2,000 years ago.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of the Colosseum
programme.desc: New evidence uncovers the ancient mysteries behind the iconic Colosseum. Archaeologists uncover the secret lives of the gladiators and make new discoveries that help explain the rise and sudden fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: According to legend, the ancient Roman city of Hierapolis hides a secret portal to the underworld beneath its streets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Sex, Lies, and the Taj Mahal
programme.desc: The Taj Mahal is one of the world's most beautiful monuments, but new investigations reveal its dark secrets. Scientists are uncovering codes that tell a shocking story of power and betrayal, challenging everything we thought we knew about the Taj Mahal.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tut's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries explore the dark secrets of Tutankhamun's tomb. Archaeologists are finally finding answers to its ancient riddles, showing how his untimely death, his calamitous burial, and an act of God made a minor king the most famous of them all.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Floating Pyramid
programme.desc: Surrounded by a mysterious trench, only one Egyptian pyramid was ever constructed to look like it floats on water; using pioneering drone-scanning technology, experts decode the ancient secrets of the pharaoh that are locked inside its hidden tunnels.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: How It's Made: Glass Faucets, Firetruck Ladders, Antique Clock Restoration and Barbecue Utensils
programme.desc: Glass faucets, firetruck ladders, antique clock restoration, and barbecue utensils are featured.

programme.title: Serengeti: d+ First Look: Serengeti II
programme.desc: Join us for a sneak peak of season 2 of the innovative series 'Serengeti.'

programme.title: How It's Made: Wood Burning Stoves, Orthoses, Ballet Slippers, Mad Buses
programme.desc: A look at how wood burning stoves are made, how orthoses are created, how ballet slippers are manufactured and how mad buses are made.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Dear Dad
programme.desc: When beloved New England handyman Jack Reid becomes the victim of a violent murder, police have no choice but to look for a killer among his many clients and adoring family. The suspect they ultimately uncover is a sociopath that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Something's Not Right
programme.desc: When a popular cheerleader goes missing in rural Arkansas, the small town is sent into a panic. After her sports car is found abandoned, investigators are sure something is not right, but no one expects the horror that ensues.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: Baby Hope
programme.desc: A grisly discovery in a picnic cooler on a highway in upper Manhattan leads detectives down a twisting trail of clues as they try to solve one of the longest-running mysteries in the New York Post's history, and hunt down a deranged child killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Price of Fame
programme.desc: In 2001, actor Robert Blake finds his new wife, Bonny Lee Bakely, shot in the head in the couple's car. The largest homicide investigation in LAPD history uncovers a story of blind ambition and betrayal.

programme.title: Murder in Grass Valley
programme.desc: 16-year-old best friends vanish from Grass Valley, a sleepy California town nestled in the foothills of the Sierra Nevada’s.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: My Best Friend's Murder
programme.desc: Ken Andersen and Chad Swedberg are childhood best friends. Then Chad turns up dead on a wooded trail, and Ken takes the fall for his murder. Ken's family says the conviction is a gross miscarriage of justice and wants Chris and Fatima to investigate.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Farming for a Motive
programme.desc: A lively slumber party turns into a nightmare when a loving mother, Dianne Watts, her young daughter, and her daughter's friend, are murdered. The town of McMinnville is turned upside down, knowing there is a killer amongst them.

programme.title: Murder in Grass Valley
programme.desc: 16-year-old best friends vanish from Grass Valley, a sleepy California town nestled in the foothills of the Sierra Nevada’s.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: My Best Friend's Murder
programme.desc: Ken Andersen and Chad Swedberg are childhood best friends. Then Chad turns up dead on a wooded trail, and Ken takes the fall for his murder. Ken's family says the conviction is a gross miscarriage of justice and wants Chris and Fatima to investigate.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Wishing Well Mystery
programme.desc: After Alyce Seff's body is found in a wishing well, the town of German Village, Ohio, is shocked to find the elderly landlady had as many enemies as she did friends. It will take police nine years to solve her case.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Hollywood Ripper
programme.desc: A woman is murdered the same night she's supposed to go out with rising star, Ashton Kutcher. Police believe the clues point to a serial killer.

programme.title: Dark Minds: Death on a Beach
programme.desc: Torrey Pines Beach, CA is an idyllic place, but it's also been the scene of horror. Two teenagers were murdered here 30 years ago and there is still no justice. The Dark Minds team retraces the final hours of the victim's lives and uncovers new clues.

programme.title: Twisted: Twisted Tourniquet
programme.desc: Women in Virginia were told to nail their windows shut in order to protect themselves from the 'Southside strangler' Timothy Spencer who climbed in through windows to kill his victims in their homes.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: In 1997, Heaven's Gate leader, Marshall Applewhite convinced 39 people to follow him to their graves. The world knows the horrible event as the largest mass suicide on US soil, but for followers, it was an exit strategy towards catching a UFO to heaven.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Murder of the Medic
programme.desc: While her husband is away, a vivacious Army Medic enjoys a night out at a dive bar near Fort Bragg, NC. But she never makes it home. And though dogs pick up her scent in a nearby swamp, her fate baffles police. Until a local PI takes up the case.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Dark Water
programme.desc: After 53-year-old Barbara Hefner disappears from her remote Georgia residence, her body is found floating in nearby Folly Lake. On the hunt for her killer, officers uncover a recent inheritance and secret affair before ultimately bringing justice home.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Who Killed Katie Autry?
programme.desc: The community of Bowling Green, Kentucky is devastated when a student is assaulted and burned in her college dorm room. After the victim succumbs to her injuries without naming her attacker, police find two suspects with very different stories.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Creek Runs Red
programme.desc: After a Tennessee fisherman finds a woman's body floating in a creek, family secrets, decades-long feuds, and a suspicious funeral shine light on a complex conspiracy. But the truth is far more shocking than anyone could have ever imagined.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Chi Town Gossip
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a local icon upends a tight-knit Chicago community. Neighbors whisper about the killer's identity and detectives must break down walls of silence to uncover the shocking plot to murder a mother and owner of a successful hair salon.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Operation Murder
programme.desc: Explore the elaborate sting operation the Houston police department used to arrest two doctors.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: You Know My Brother's Name
programme.desc: When Karen Kuzma was a little girl, she adored her older brother. As they grew older, she saw changes in him that she didn't understand, but it never occurred to her that he was becoming the most infamous serial killer in American history.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Thanksgiving Ambush
programme.desc: Rob and Brenda Andrew are a devout couple, living in the Bible Belt of Oklahoma City. But their world is shattered when both of them are shot during a violent home invasion. The mastermind will prove to be closer than anyone ever imagined.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Welcome to the Devil House
programme.desc: A mansion deep in the Georgia woods is said to house terrible secrets. Everyone in this rural county has heard the rumors, but no one knows the truth ... until a 1982 visit to Corpsewood Manor by a group of young locals turns deadly.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Love and Death
programme.desc: Atlanta pre-school teacher Julie Love goes missing just a week after getting engaged to her boyfriend Mark. Detectives uncover numerous suspects, but the evil truth is worse than they ever could have imagined...

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Weekender
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael aim to help restore Galveston's reputation as America's 'Playground of the South.'

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Shirtwaist Second Chance
programme.desc: Tamara Day restores neglected large homes, and helps families to love them again.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: For home restoration expert Tamara Day, there's no such thing as a home that's too big! She specializes in restoring the neglected large homes that others are too scared to take on. She brings these beauties back to life for new families to love.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Jamestown Moose Lodge
programme.desc: Eager to save some late Victorian architecture, the 'dawgs' accept an invitation to salvage a hundred-year-old Moose Lodge in Jamestown, NY. The ten hour drive proves worth it as they collect unique stair spindles and perplexing turrets.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barn Storming: A Wild Takedown in Pleasantville, Ohio
programme.desc: Mark and the guys have fought rain, snow and heat, but they've never had winds like these! The vicious Ohio winds turn a complicated job into a treacherous one as they attempt to save a giant double pen barn.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Fancy Cabin Takedown in Minor Hill
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work through layers of architectural history to uncover an original pioneer home. They hear stories from family members who lived in the cabin. Mark also visits a beautifully restored log home with its own extensive history.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Castle in Cave Spring, GA
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders turn one of the biggest barns they've ever saved into an even bigger home. They work through sweltering heat to transform this Ohio double-pen barn. Mark visits a small log cabin with a lot of charm and gets a look at the dog trot.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: A New York State of Mind
programme.desc: The builders head up the Appalachian mountain chain to the Catskill Mountains in New York to build a huge, antique log guesthouse for a couple who traded city life for country life.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Mountaineer Volunteers
programme.desc: Mark donates a timber frame to his alma mater, West Virginia University, as the latest addition to their pioneer heritage center.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Moisture Madness
programme.desc: A downtown storefront property has become a home with a moisture problem.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Something Stinks
programme.desc: Something smells rotten in a next-to-new townhouse.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Acres of Pain
programme.desc: Jason and Kim were thrilled to be able to buy their dream house, an unusual design built on three acres. Once they moved in, they began to realize they had much more serious safety issues than were clear in their home inspection report.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Bigger Not Better
programme.desc: Mitzi and Cory bought a big suburban house in a nice neighbourhood near the grandparents. Mike Holmes will show them bigger is not always better.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Terminated
programme.desc: Gail and Kevin were thrilled to find a house they could afford just minutes from their daughter's school. The inspector saw asbestos wrapped ducts, but the house was beautifully renovated so there was no need to disturb them.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Good Eats: Pop Culture
programme.desc: Chef/ Scientist Alton Brown investigates modern movie popcorn.

programme.title: Good Eats: Okraphobia
programme.desc: Alton Brown investigates the misunderstood okra.

programme.title: Good Eats: Use Your Noodle 4: Lasagna
programme.desc: Learn how to make lasagna, the number one comfort food.

programme.title: Good Eats: Raw Ambition
programme.desc: Alton journeys through the history and science of the greatest of all raw meat dishes: steak tartare.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Lima
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the most famous foods in this Peruvian city by the sea.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Louisville, KY, which boasts one of the most eclectic food scenes in the country. He digs in to Southern favorites with an Asian twist, fried chicken served with a fiery sauce and comfort food for the modern era.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Houston
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Houston, TX, one of the most dynamic and underrated food scenes in the United States. He digs into some classic Tex-Mex fare, loads up on the best brisket in town and gets a taste of the city's crave-worthy international cuisines.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Diego
programme.desc: Andrew highlights San Diego's sun-soaked cuisine, served surfside. The laid-back beach town is known for its Mexican-inspired fish tacos, octopus tostadas, Filipino chicken adobo, So-Cal monster burritos, and a globally-loved hometown salad.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Nova Scotia
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores iconic dishes of picturesque Nova Scotia, Canada, which became a fishing hub after being settled by Europeans in the 16th century. The proximity to the sea -- it's never more than 42 miles away!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Iowa State Fair
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shares a tour of the Iowa State Fair, one of the largest and best known state fairs in the U.S. A gastronomic trip through the 445-acre fairgrounds reveals fresh, locally grown sweet corn, baked sausage cavatelli and Dutch letter pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bangkok: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Bangkok, Thailand, has so many culinary treasures, it deserves a second trip! From steamed whole bass to massaman curry, Andrew highlights the city's exotic flavors and meals that are meant to be shared.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Lima
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the most famous foods in this Peruvian city by the sea.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Louisville, KY, which boasts one of the most eclectic food scenes in the country. He digs in to Southern favorites with an Asian twist, fried chicken served with a fiery sauce and comfort food for the modern era.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Houston
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Houston, TX, one of the most dynamic and underrated food scenes in the United States. He digs into some classic Tex-Mex fare, loads up on the best brisket in town and gets a taste of the city's crave-worthy international cuisines.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Diego
programme.desc: Andrew highlights San Diego's sun-soaked cuisine, served surfside. The laid-back beach town is known for its Mexican-inspired fish tacos, octopus tostadas, Filipino chicken adobo, So-Cal monster burritos, and a globally-loved hometown salad.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Nova Scotia
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores iconic dishes of picturesque Nova Scotia, Canada, which became a fishing hub after being settled by Europeans in the 16th century. The proximity to the sea -- it's never more than 42 miles away!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Iowa State Fair

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Family Recipes

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Game Day Munchies

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Layers of Flavours
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean layers it on thick as he digs into lovely layered feasts. He'll find out if club sandwiches were once for members only, how tiramisu tried to take coffee's job and why London may lay claim to lasagna.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Potlucky
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean enlightens us all on how the potluck got started. He discovers how the casserole began as just a pan, why chocolate sheet cake is a Texas treasure and when potlucks first became bring-and-share bashes.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Tasting is Believing
programme.desc: Michael McKean reveals the flavours we hold near and dear are not always what they appear. He'll show us how apple pie could go crackers, why seaweed is giving bacon a run for its money and how texture can totally determine taste.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Doctor's Note
programme.desc: Michael uncovers the truth behind America's most popular food remedies. Do carrots really improve our eyesight; can a bowl of chicken soup cure a stuffy nose.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: What's For Dessert
programme.desc: Michael McKean as we indulge in the best part of every meal: Dessert! From cake to pie to banana splits, our favorite desserts are baked with rich stories that have shaped America in extraordinary ways.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Passports Please!
programme.desc: Michael McKean journeys around the food globe to find out where some of our most popular international dishes were really born.

programme.title: Parker Plays

programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.desc: Phineas and the gang switch bodies with alien tourists for a free intergalactic vacation, only to realize they were actually duped and are now stranded on the alien planet.

programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: A True Hero! Tag Battle Style!
programme.desc: When Hikaru and Rantaro go up against Dante and Lui, one thing is clear: they’d better hope their teamwork is enough to win! Meanwhile, Aiger finds himself conflicted over his pairing with Lain Valhalla.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thaddeus and Thor/ De Plane! De Plane!
programme.desc: Candace, Phineas and Ferb compete with their look-alikes; Candace goes to a party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Let's Take a Quiz/ At the Car Wash
programme.desc: Candace wants to win popularity by going on Phineas and Ferb's TV game show. Later, an automatic carwash is created to help Isabella and the Fireside girls meet their fundraising goals.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Oh, There You Are, Perry/ Swiss Family Phineas
programme.desc: A musical device is built to find Perry/ A trip at sea strands the family on an island.
